content.body:
Deletes delegation-mandatory, think-before-execute, know-what-you-dont-know,
peer-review-automatic constraints and task-intake skill from the active KB.
Removes the entire .leo/profiles/ directory. Runtimes handle task routing
natively; LEO's value is the memory layer, not an agent framework.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
content.subject: chore(kb): remove retired orchestration constraints, task-intake skill, and profiles
